generated_oml:
{
   instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
      base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor"
      DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
      base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox"
      DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
      DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
   ]
   instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
      DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
   ]
   instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
      base:desc "Position data from encoders"
      DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
   ]
   instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
      base:desc "Velocity data from encoders"
      DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
   ]
   instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
      base:desc "Current data from sensors"
      DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
   ]
   instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
      base:desc "Derived torque data"
      DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
   ]
   instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "SysML modeling for structural models"
      DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
   ]
   instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation"
      DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
   ]
   instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data traceability"
      DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
   ]
   instance MQTTStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
      DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
   ]
   instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
      DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
   ]
   instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
      base:desc "Dashboard for visualization"
      DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
   ]
   instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
      base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware joint friction identification"
      DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
   ]
   instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
      base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard"
      DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
   ]
   instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
      base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computations"
      DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
   ]
   instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
      base:desc "Friction model identification for motion accuracy improvement"
   ]
   instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
      base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion and friction data"
   ]
   instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
      base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computations"
   ]
   instance AdjustControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
      base:desc "Adjusting control algorithms based on friction data"
      DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
   ]
   instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for robot structure"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for component connections"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Stribeck friction model"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Dahl friction model"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "MATLAB Simulink LuGre friction model"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
      base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data traceability"
      DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS
      base:isContainedIn RobotEnvironment
   ]
   instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
      base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, SysML_BDD, SysML_IBD, CoulombViscousModel, StribeckModel, DahlModel, LuGreModel, AASModel
   ]
   instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
      base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
      DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RobotEnvironment
   ]
}
